name: DSR 2023 — Delhi Schedule of Rates (CPWD)
regulator: Central Public Works Department, Government of India
note_reference_year: DSR is annually updated. 2023 is the most recent published edition at v5.7.0 ship date. The onboarding wizard prompts the user to confirm the active reference year and quarterly Cost Index.
scope: Central PWD works in Delhi NCR + base reference for state SoRs. State works should additionally enable the matching state SoR rule pack when available.
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that align BOQ unit rates and item references with the CPWD Delhi Schedule of Rates 2023, apply the current quarterly Cost Index, validate item-code format (chapter.section.item), unit consistency (cum / sqm / Rmt / Quintal / Kg / each / lump-sum), and require labour+material+P&T breakup for extra-item analysis citing the Yardstick and Pamphlet of Rates. Flags positions deviating beyond the acceptable variance band.
description_hi: बीओक्यू दरों को डीएसआर 2023 के अनुसार संरेखित करना, वर्तमान लागत सूचकांक लागू करना और स्वीकार्य भिन्नता बैंड से बाहर की मदों को फ़्लैग करना।
